rules.name: myRule_1
rules.label: Create Chargent Order Credit Card Full Payment

rules.name: myRule_4
rules.label: Create Chargent Order Credit Card Partial Payment

rules.name: myRule_7
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: All Other Payments Full

rules.name: myRule_10
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: All Other Payments Partial

Flow.description: Process handles that chargent order creation
Flow.label: Charge Order - Creation
